name: Saffron Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Cooked rice (cooked in chicken broth and cooled to room temperature)
1/4 cup Sliced green onions, including tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the white wine vinegar, olive oil, hot pepper sauce (if desired), minced garlic, and ground white pepper.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Add the cooked rice to the bowl and gently toss to coat evenly.
4. Add diced red pepper, diced green pepper, sliced green onions, and sliced ripe olives.
5. Toss lightly to combine all ingredients.
6. Serve on lettuce leaves.
